name: python3-flask-sqlalchemy
title: python3-flask-sqlalchemy
summary: SQLAlchemy support to your Python 3 Flask application (Python3)
description:
SQLAlchemy support to your Python 3 Flask application (Python3)
Flask is a micro web framework for Python based on Werkzeug, Jinja 2 and good
intentions.
.
This python3 package adds SQLAlchemy support to Flask. The aim of SQLAlchemy
is to make accomplishing common tasks in Flask application easier by providing
useful defaults and extra helpers.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flask-sqlalchemy because SQLAlchemy support to your Python 3 Flask application (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flask-sqlalchemy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flask-sqlalchemy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flask-sqlalchemy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
